query:
ALTER TABLE business_entities 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ein VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stateOfFormation VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stateEntityId VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS formationDate TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS registeredAddress TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS physicalAddress TEXT;
